stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Regarding the airspeed display shown in the annex, the input pressure source is…

options.a: calculated within the instrument, in analogue form, by subtracting static pressure from pitot pressure.
options.b: Pitot and static which is then fed to the ADC
options.c: Static, and it is converted into a digital signal by a transducer
options.d: Pitot, and it is converted into a digital signal by a transducer
